text: Preamble

Cross-Realm Intelligence Archive
Version 1.0

Introduction
The Cross-Realm Intelligence Archive was created after the unprecedented
Convergence Event of 18 October 2042, during which three separate worlds became
temporarily connected through unstable dimensional gateways. These worlds were
identified as the Grand Line Realm, the Cursed Energy Realm, and the Demon Age
Realm.
The purpose of this archive is to document notable individuals, organizations,
locations, artifacts, and historical events observed during the seven-month
convergence period.
All information contained within this document was collected by the Inter-Realm
Observation Bureau (IROB).
Major Organizations

Straw Hat Expeditionary Fleet
Commander:
Monkey D. Luffy
Fleet Strength:
5,600 personnel
Primary Vessel:
Thousand Sunny II
Headquarters:
Floating Harbor of New Dawn
The Straw Hat Expeditionary Fleet became one of the first organizations to establish
diplomatic relations with inhabitants from the Cursed Energy Realm.
Luffy was observed forming an alliance with Yuji Itadori after the Incident of Twin
Horizons.

Tokyo Metropolitan Jujutsu Academy
Principal:
Satoru Gojo
Student Population:
412
Headquarters:
Neo Tokyo District
Primary Objective:
Detection and elimination of cursed entities.
The academy served as the primary research center studying dimensional instability
caused by the convergence.

Demon Slayer Corps Restoration Division
Commander:
Tanjiro Kamado
Personnel:
2,840 active members
Headquarters:
Kasugai Fortress
Primary Objective:
Elimination of remaining demon populations.
Following the convergence, the corps developed new breathing styles specifically
adapted for cursed spirit encounters.
Key Individuals

Monkey D. Luffy
Age:
21
Known Abilities:
• Advanced Conqueror's Haki
• Advanced Observation Haki
• Sun God Transformation
Bounty During Convergence:
4.8 billion berries
Luffy participated in twelve major inter-realm operations and was awarded the Unity
Medal by the Observation Bureau.

Satoru Gojo
Age:
32
Known Abilities:
• Limitless Technique
• Six Eyes
• Domain Expansion: Infinite Void
Gojo was considered the strongest sorcerer active during the convergence period.
Research logs indicate that Gojo successfully neutralized six dimensional fractures
near Neo Tokyo.

Tanjiro Kamado
Age:
19
Known Abilities:
• Sun Breathing
• Enhanced Senses
• Transparent World
Tanjiro coordinated joint missions between demon slayers and jujutsu sorcerers.
He was credited with preventing the Fall of Kasugai Fortress during the Crimson
Eclipse Crisis.
Significant Locations

New Dawn Harbor
Location Type:
Floating City
Population:
78,000
Primary Function:
Trade and diplomacy.
The harbor was jointly administered by representatives from all three realms.
It became the center of inter-dimensional commerce.

Shibuya Rift Zone
Location Type:
Dimensional Fracture Site
Risk Classification:
Level Omega
The Shibuya Rift Zone remained unstable throughout the convergence.
A total of 342 cursed entities emerged from the zone between November 2042 and
March 2043.

Mount Hinokami Research Facility
Location:
Northern Fire Province
Purpose:
Study of breathing techniques and cursed energy interactions.
Director:
Kento Nanami
The facility produced the first successful hybrid combat doctrine used against Rift
Demons.
Special Artifacts

Black Horizon Compass
Classification:
Legendary Navigation Artifact
Original Owner:
Nami
Capabilities:
• Detect dimensional gateways
• Predict convergence storms
• Track cursed energy concentrations
The artifact was recovered during the Battle of Crimson Waters.

Six-Eyed Codex
Classification:
Restricted Archive
Custodian:
Satoru Gojo
Purpose:
Research on advanced dimensional mathematics.
Only seven copies were authorized during the convergence period.

Solar Nichirin Core
Classification:
Energy Artifact
Custodian:
Tanjiro Kamado
The core powered the barrier network protecting Kasugai Fortress.
Its energy output was measured at 14.2 terajoules.
Historical Events

The Convergence Event
Date:
18 October 2042
Description:
The first recorded contact between the three realms.
Scientists estimate that seventeen major dimensional gateways appeared
simultaneously across the connected worlds.
The event lasted approximately seven months.

Incident of Twin Horizons
Date:
2 November 2042
Location:
New Dawn Harbor
Participants:
Monkey D. Luffy
Yuji Itadori
Megumi Fushiguro
Description:
A large-scale cursed spirit invasion threatened the harbor.
Joint operations successfully repelled the attack after nine hours of combat.
Recorded Casualties:
48

Crimson Eclipse Crisis
Date:
14 January 2043
Location:
Kasugai Fortress
Description:
A rare celestial alignment dramatically increased demon regeneration capabilities.
Tanjiro Kamado organized the fortress defense.
The battle lasted thirty-one hours.
Enemy Forces:
Approximately 11,000 hostile entities.
Friendly Forces:
4,200 defenders.
Outcome:
Strategic victory.

Battle of Crimson Waters
Date:
22 February 2043
Location:
Southern Rift Sea
Description:
Combined naval forces encountered a Rift Leviathan.
The creature measured 780 meters in length.
Luffy delivered the final attack that neutralized the threat.
The Black Horizon Compass was recovered after the battle.
Research Programs

Project Infinite Tide
Lead Researcher:
Nico Robin
Objective:
Study relationships between cursed energy and Haki.
Budget:
420 million credits.
Status:
Completed.
Key Finding:
Observation Haki users displayed significantly higher resistance to low-grade cursed
influence.

Project Scarlet Breathing
Lead Researcher:
Tanjiro Kamado
Objective:
Develop anti-cursed breathing techniques.
Status:
Operational.
Result:
Creation of Crimson Sun Breathing, a style specifically effective against Rift Demons.

Project Void Anchor
Lead Researcher:
Satoru Gojo
Objective:
Stabilize dimensional fractures.
Status:
Partially Successful.
Result:
Dimensional instability reduced by 63% near major population centers.

Final Convergence Statistics
Duration:
214 days
Confirmed Gateways:
17
Major Battles:
43
Joint Operations:
118
Artifacts Recovered:
92
Sorcerers Deployed:
1,240
Demon Slayers Deployed:
2,840
Fleet Personnel Deployed:
5,600
Civilian Evacuations:
182,000
Dimensional Fractures Sealed:
11
Remaining Active Fractures:
6

Conclusion
The Convergence Event demonstrated that cooperation between the Grand Line
Realm, the Cursed Energy Realm, and the Demon Age Realm was possible despite
major cultural and technological differences.
The alliances formed between Monkey D. Luffy, Satoru Gojo, Tanjiro Kamado, Yuji
Itadori, Megumi Fushiguro, Nico Robin, and numerous others prevented large-scale
catastrophe and established the foundation for future inter-realm cooperation.
The archive remains one of the most important records of the convergence period
and serves as the primary reference document for all future dimensional research
initiatives.
